add-text-field-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text Field to PDF Page Using FormEditor
add-text-field-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a text form field named "CustomerName" to page 1 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

add-unchecked-checkbox-to-pdf-page-2.title: Add Unchecked Checkbox to PDF Page 2
add-unchecked-checkbox-to-pdf-page-2.description: Shows how to insert an unchecked checkbox form field named "AgreeTerms" on the second page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a submit button on page 1 of a PDF that posts form data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-pdf-form-field-alignment-center.title: Set PDF Form Field Alignment to Center
set-pdf-form-field-alignment-center.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using FormEditor to set the horizontal alignment of the "Address" form field to center, and saving the updated document.

apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.title: Apply Default Decoration to All Text Fields in a PDF
apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.description: Shows how to configure a FormFieldFacade with background, text, and border colors and alignment, then apply those visual settings to every text field in a PDF using FormEditor and save the decorated document.

copy-field-content-between-pdf-form-fiel.title: Copy Field Content Between PDF Form Fields
copy-field-content-between-pdf-form-fiel.description: Demonstrates how to read the value of one AcroForm field and write it to another field in the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to FDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and export all its form fields to an FDF file for external processing.

populate-countrylist-with-195-country-na.title: Populate Countrylist With 195 Country Names Using Addlistitem In A Loop

set-text-field-to-multiline.title: Set Text Field to Multiline in PDF Form
set-text-field-to-multiline.description: Shows how to convert the single‑line text field "Comments" into a multiline field in an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

import-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Import PDF Form Fields from JSON
import-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading field definitions from a JSON file and creating matching form fields in a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

attach-javascript-validation-to-age-fiel.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to Age Field in PDF
attach-javascript-validation-to-age-fiel.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, attaching a JavaScript snippet to the "Age" form field that shows a warning when the entered value is less than 18, and saving the modified document.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-text-fields.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Text Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-text-fields.description: Shows how to set a custom font (Arial Bold) for every text form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Import PDF Form Fields from XML
import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import form field values from an XML file using the Form facade, and save the updated PDF.

add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.title: Add Radio Button Group "PaymentMethod" to PDF
add-paymentmethod-radio-button-group.description: Shows how to create a three‑page PDF and add a radio button group named PaymentMethod with options Credit and PayPal on page 3 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-button.title: Add JavaScript Alert to PDF Push Button
add-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-button.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, locate a push button named "ShowInfo", attach a JavaScript alert that runs on click, and save the modified document.

decorate-pdf-form-field-custom-style.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Custom Border, Background, and Font
decorate-pdf-form-field-custom-style.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a custom border color, background shade, and font style to a specific form field in an existing PDF document.

set-custom-image-background-for-pdf-sign.title: Set Custom Image Background for PDF Signature Field
set-custom-image-background-for-pdf-sign.description: Shows how to apply a custom appearance with an image background to a signature field using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

set-field-attribute-required-aspdf.title: Set Required Flag on PDF Form Field using FormEditor
set-field-attribute-required-aspdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, using FormEditor.SetFieldAttribute to set the Required PropertyFlag on a form field, and saving the modified document. It also notes the limitation of not being able to add arbitrary custom attributes.

set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Numeric Limit for PDF Form Field
set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to restrict the "Quantity" form field to values between 1 and 100 by applying a character limit using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-list-item-to-pdf-dropdown.title: Add List Item to PDF Dropdown Field
add-list-item-to-pdf-dropdown.description: Shows how to add a new option (list item) to an existing combo box (dropdown) form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-list-item-from-pdf-form-field.title: Remove List Item from PDF Form Field
remove-list-item-from-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to delete a specific list item ("Option B") from a list field ("Choices") on a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

clone-pdf-form-field-to-page.title: Clone PDF Form Field to a Specific Page
clone-pdf-form-field-to-page.description: Demonstrates how to copy the outer definition of a form field from one PDF and place it on a specific page of another PDF, then rename the cloned field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

move-form-field-to-coordinates.title: Move PDF Form Field to Specific Coordinates
move-form-field-to-coordinates.description: Demonstrates how to relocate a form field named "DateField" to a new position on page 2 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor and save the updated PDF.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove Form Field from PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete an unused form field from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to rename an AcroForm/XFA field in a PDF document with the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class and persist the changes.

add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.title: Add Email Validation JavaScript to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to the Email text field of a PDF to validate the email format on blur (focus loss) using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Form Data into PDF
import-xfdf-form-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XFDF file and import its form field values into an existing PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

batch-add-hidden-guid-field-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Hidden GUID Field to PDFs
batch-add-hidden-guid-field-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a folder and add a hidden text field containing a generated GUID to each document using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-consistent-decoration-to-checkbox-.title: Apply Consistent Decoration to Checkbox Fields in PDFs
apply-consistent-decoration-to-checkbox-.description: Processes all PDF files in a directory, sets visual attributes for form fields using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade, decorates every checkbox field, and saves the updated documents.

update-submit-button-urls-in-pdfs.title: Update Submit Button URLs in PDFs
update-submit-button-urls-in-pdfs.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files and change the URL of every form submit button using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

clear-repopulate-dropdown-list.title: Clear and Repopulate Dropdown List in PDF Form
clear-repopulate-dropdown-list.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing options from a PDF form dropdown field and add new items using Aspose.Pdf.

set-form-field-readonly-currency-format.title: Set Form Field to Read‑Only and Apply Currency Formatting
set-form-field-readonly-currency-format.description: Demonstrates how to make a PDF form field read‑only, apply printable appearance flags, and fill it with a currency‑formatted placeholder using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-js-clear-discountcode-field.title: Attach JavaScript to Clear DiscountCode Field on Focus
attach-js-clear-discountcode-field.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor to add a JavaScript action that clears the "DiscountCode" form field when it receives focus, then saves the modified PDF.

copy-form-fields-from-template.title: Copy Form Field Definitions from Template PDF
copy-form-fields-from-template.description: Shows how to copy form field definitions from a template PDF to another PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.title: Move All PDF Form Fields by Offset
move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.description: Shows how to shift every form field in a PDF document by a specified X and Y offset using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

rename-pdf-form-fields-prefix.title: Rename PDF Form Fields with Prefix
rename-pdf-form-fields-prefix.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF form fields and rename those that start with a specific prefix using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade.

set-signature-field-border-thickness.title: Apply Border Thickness and Read‑Only Flag to a Signature Field
set-signature-field-border-thickness.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom 2‑point border on a PDF signature form field and mark it as read‑only using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

set-form-field-background-color.title: Set Form Field Background Color to Light Green
set-form-field-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to change the background color of a PDF form field named "Status" to light green using Aspose.Pdf.Facades FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

add-hidden-sessionid-field-with-guid-to-.title: Add Hidden SessionId Field with GUID to PDFs in Batch
add-hidden-sessionid-field-with-guid-to-.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files, add a hidden text field named "SessionId" on the first page, fill it with a generated GUID, and save the modified documents using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-validation-js-to-pdf-submit-butto.title: Attach Validation JavaScript to PDF Submit Button
attach-validation-js-to-pdf-submit-butto.description: Demonstrates how to add JavaScript to a PDF submit button using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to validate required fields before submitting the form.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and export its form field definitions to an indented JSON file.

set-field-limit-for-pdf-form.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Field
set-field-limit-for-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to set a maximum character length for a text field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

set-date-field-format-in-pdf.title: Set Date Field Format in PDF Form
set-date-field-format-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a date field in a PDF form and change its display format to "MM/dd/yyyy" using Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.title: Add Reset Form Button to PDF
add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button named "ResetForm" into a PDF and attach JavaScript that clears all form fields when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

decorate-radio-buttons-with-custom-icons.title: Decorate Radio Buttons with Custom Icons
decorate-radio-buttons-with-custom-icons.description: Demonstrates iterating over radio button fields in a PDF and applying custom selected and unselected icons using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

restrict-score-field-to-integer-range-0-.title: Restrict Score Field to Integer Range 0-100 in PDF Form
restrict-score-field-to-integer-range-0-.description: Demonstrates how to limit an AcroForm numeric field to accept only integer values between 0 and 100 by setting a character limit using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

copy-image-field-content-to-another-fiel.title: Copy Image Field Content to Another PDF Form Field
copy-image-field-content-to-another-fiel.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to copy the inner content of an existing image form field (Logo) to a new image field (HeaderLogo) in the same PDF document.

remove-empty-pdf-form-field.title: Remove Empty PDF Form Field
remove-empty-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to read a PDF form field value and delete the field when it contains no user input using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

rename-pdf-form-fields-csv-mapping.title: Rename PDF Form Fields Using CSV Mapping
rename-pdf-form-fields-csv-mapping.description: Shows how to load a field name mapping from a CSV file and rename PDF form fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Appearance
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Shows how to add a signature field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF, assign a visual appearance image, and sign the field using a PKCS#1 certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-form-field-required.title: Set PDF Form Field as Required with Asterisk Indicator
set-pdf-form-field-required.description: Demonstrates how to mark a PDF form field as required using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, which causes PDF viewers to display an asterisk next to the field.

batch-add-selectall-checkbox.title: Batch Add 'SelectAll' Checkbox to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-selectall-checkbox.description: Shows how to loop through PDFs in a folder and use the FormEditor facade to add a checkbox field named "SelectAll" to the first page of each document, then save the modified files to an output directory.

move-form-field-to-bottom-margin.title: Move Form Field to Bottom Margin on Each PDF Page
move-form-field-to-bottom-margin.description: Demonstrates how to reposition a specific form field (FooterNote) to the bottom margin of every page in a PDF by calculating coordinates and using FormEditor.CopyInnerField.

set-field-appearance-format-price.title: Set Field Appearance and Format Value for PDF Form Field
set-field-appearance-format-price.description: Demonstrates how to change a form field's appearance using SetFieldAppearance and then fill the field with a value formatted to two decimal places.

attach-js-to-quantity-field.title: Attach JavaScript to PDF Form Field for Auto‑Calculating Total Price
attach-js-to-quantity-field.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor to add a JavaScript action to the 'Quantity' field so that the 'TotalPrice' field is automatically computed from quantity and unit price.

export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.title: Export and Re‑import PDF Form Fields using XML
export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.description: Shows how to export PDF form field values to an XML file for archival and later re‑import them back into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-list-box-field-priority.title: Add List Box Field 'Priority' to PDF
add-list-box-field-priority.description: Shows how to create or load a PDF and add a list box form field named "Priority" with items Low, Medium, High and a default value of Medium using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.title: Remove Button Fields from PDF Form
remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate button form fields, delete them, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-concatenate-pdfs-unique-form-field.title: Batch Concatenate PDFs with Unique Form Field Names
batch-concatenate-pdfs-unique-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF form files in a batch while automatically renaming duplicate form field names using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

add-email-validation-to-pdf-form-field.title: Add Email Validation to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-to-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to attach a JavaScript validation script to a PDF form field, enforcing proper email syntax.

decorate-pdf-form-field-background-cente.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Background Color and Centered Text
decorate-pdf-form-field-background-cente.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to apply a background color and center‑align the text of a specific form field ("Header") in an existing PDF document.

add-hidden-numeric-version-field.title: Add Hidden Numeric Version Field to PDF
add-hidden-numeric-version-field.description: Shows how to insert a hidden numeric form field named "Version" with a value of 2 into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

copy-rename-pdf-form-field-page.title: Copy and Rename PDF Form Field on a Specific Page
copy-rename-pdf-form-field-page.description: Demonstrates how to copy the outer definition of an existing form field to another page and then rename the copied field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.title: Move Signature Field to Lower‑Right Corner on Page 5
move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.description: Shows how to reposition an AcroForm field named "Signature" to a specific rectangle on page 5 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form-fi.title: Set Rich Text Formatting for PDF Form Field
set-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form-fi.description: Shows how to enable rich‑text editing on a PDF form field named "Comments" by configuring its default appearance, multiline setting, and clearing existing content using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-javascript-populate-date-field.title: Attach JavaScript to Populate Date Field on PDF Open
attach-javascript-populate-date-field.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor to add a JavaScript action that fills a form field named "Date" with the current date when the PDF is opened.

export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.title: Export Checkbox Fields to FDF File
export-checkbox-fields-to-fdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, remove all non‑checkbox form fields, and export the remaining checkbox definitions to an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf facades.

import-checkbox-definitions-from-fdf.title: Import Checkbox Definitions from FDF into PDF
import-checkbox-definitions-from-fdf.description: Shows how to import checkbox field definitions from an FDF file into an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, updating matching fields while preventing duplication, and then saving the merged PDF.

add-state-combo-box-to-pdf.title: Add State Combo Box to PDF
add-state-combo-box-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a combo box form field named "State", and populate it with U.S. state abbreviations using AddListItem.

remove-non-whitelisted-items-from-pdf-li.title: Remove Non-Whitelisted Items from PDF List Field
remove-non-whitelisted-items-from-pdf-li.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF form, iterate through a list field, and delete any items that are not present in a predefined whitelist using Aspose.Pdf.

set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.title: Set TaxRate Field to Read‑Only and Calculate with JavaScript
set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.description: Shows how to make a PDF form field read‑only and attach JavaScript that computes its value from the Subtotal field using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

decorate-list-fields-uniform-border.title: Decorate List Fields with Uniform Border and Background
decorate-list-fields-uniform-border.description: Demonstrates how to apply a consistent background color, border color, style, and width to all list-type form fields (ListBox and ComboBox) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

rename-pdf-form-fields-to-camelcase.title: Rename PDF Form Fields to camelCase
rename-pdf-form-fields-to-camelcase.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating over its form fields, and renaming each field's PartialName to camelCase using Aspose.Pdf.

add-print-button-to-pdf.title: Add Print Button to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf FormEditor
add-print-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push button into a PDF that triggers the print dialog via JavaScript using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

hide-form-field-while-keeping-exportable.title: Hide Form Field While Keeping It Exportable
hide-form-field-while-keeping-exportable.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF form field to be invisible in the viewer while still including its value in form data submissions using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-notes-to-summary.title: Copy Notes Field to Summary in PDF Form
copy-notes-to-summary.description: Shows how to retrieve the value of a PDF form field (Notes) and write the same text into another field (Summary) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

move-form-fields-page-offset.title: Move Form Fields on Page 2 by 5 Points
move-form-fields-page-offset.description: Shows how to shift all form fields on the second page of a PDF 5 points to the right using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

configure-discount-number-field-two-deci.title: Configure Discount Number Field with Two Decimal Precision
configure-discount-number-field-two-deci.description: Shows how to locate a NumberField named "Discount" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and restrict its input to numeric characters with two‑decimal precision.

attach-confirmation-js-to-pdf-submit-but.title: Attach Confirmation JavaScript to PDF Submit Button
attach-confirmation-js-to-pdf-submit-but.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a JavaScript confirmation dialog to a submit button using FormEditor, and save the modified PDF.

add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf-for.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf-for.description: Demonstrates how to add a radio button group named "Gender" with options Male, Female, Other and set a default selection using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.title: Remove Temporary Form Fields from PDF
remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate form fields whose names start with "Temp_" and delete them from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-address-field-auto-wrap.title: Set Address Field to Auto‑Wrap and Adjust Height
set-address-field-auto-wrap.description: Demonstrates converting a single‑line "Address" form field to a multiline field and enabling word‑wrap for added text using Aspose.Pdf facades, then saves the updated PDF.

decorate-pdf-form-field-italic-gray.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Italic Font and Gray Background
decorate-pdf-form-field-italic-gray.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply an italic font style and a light gray background to a specific form field in a PDF document.

add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden AuthToken Field to PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facade
add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a secure random token and embed it as a hidden text field named "AuthToken" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

duplicate-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate PDF Form Field with FormEditor
duplicate-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates copying an existing form field named "Signature" to a new field "SignatureCopy" on the same page using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

move-pdf-form-field-to-top-left.title: Move PDF Form Field to Top‑Left Corner with Specific Size
move-pdf-form-field-to-top-left.description: Shows how to reposition a form field (e.g., a logo) to the top‑left corner of the first page with a defined width and height using Aspose.Pdf.

set-input-mask-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Input Mask for PDF Form Field
set-input-mask-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, apply a custom attribute (e.g., an input mask) to a form field using FormEditor, and save the updated document.

attach-js-reset-button-clear-hidden-fiel.title: Attach JavaScript to Reset Button to Clear Hidden Fields
attach-js-reset-button-clear-hidden-fiel.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade to add JavaScript to a reset button that clears hidden form fields before resetting the PDF form.

export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Field Layout to JSON
export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read each form field's rectangle coordinates, and serialize the layout data to a JSON file for UI reconstruction.

import-field-layout-from-json.title: Import Form Field Layout from JSON into PDF
import-field-layout-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON file that defines form field positions and types, then creating a PDF and adding those fields using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.
